text_original:
The feet of the lin:—
The noble sons of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!

The forehead of the lin:—
The noble grandsons of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!

The horn of the lin:—
The noble kindred of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!
text_normalized:
The feet of the lin:—
The noble sons of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!

The forehead of the lin:—
The noble grandsons of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!

The horn of the lin:—
The noble kindred of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!
